attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.TARGET_ASSIGNMENT_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.RECORD_TYPE, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SOURCE_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.REQUEST_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.STATUS, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.INTERFACE_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.RULE_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.MODEL_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ACCOUNTING_DATE, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.TRANSACTION_CLASS, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.CATEGORY, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SOURCE, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.CURRENCY_CODE, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT1, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT2, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT3, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT4, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT5, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT6, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT7, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT8, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT9, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT10, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT11, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT12, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT13, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT14, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SEGMENT15, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ENTERED_DR, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ENTERED_CR, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ENTERED_EXCH_RATE, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ACCOUNTED_DR, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ACCOUNTED_CR, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ACCOUNTED_EXCH_RATE, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.BATCH_NUMBER, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.MODEL_CTL_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.TAX_REGISTRATION_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ROUNDING_AMOUNT, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ENTERED_ROUNDING_AMOUNT, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.TARGET_INSTANCE_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SOURCE_ACTIVITY, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE1, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE2, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE3, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE4, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE5, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE6, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE7, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE8, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE9, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ATTRIBUTE10, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.PROCESS_SUMMARY_ID, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.ICS_FLAG, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.CREATION_DATE, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.CREATED_BY, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY
WHERE   SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND   SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY   CG1_CP_PROCESS_HISTORY.PROCESS_HISTORY_ID ORDER BY   REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
